headline: Morgan Stanley Maintains Overweight on Regency Centers, Raises Price Target to $88
summary: Morgan Stanley  analyst Ronald Kamdem   maintains Regency Centers (NASDAQ:REG) with a Overweight and raises the price target from $85 to $88.
